sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71649" key="cifi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξῐφ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n71649.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dance the sword-dance,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:219" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">219</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
